long_description:
[TEL] NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs no output records is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_host_logging_agent_troubleshooting.html
TIP Short Description: NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs on host vault-k8s-node6-mon-prod has no output records for the past 1 hour
TIP Situation: NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs no output records
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::mgmt:host:vault-k8s-node6-mon-prod

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    avg by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_cluster_type) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{ name="output_log_router_icl_ops_logs", program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/ops-logs/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster=""}[1m])) < 1 = 0
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster_type = 'mgmt' and host_hostname = 'vault-k8s-node6-mon-prod'

Time:             12/09/2025 06:14 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/675be9de-53de-4e9b-b61e-5e297333a334?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F44054383%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:
